overview: N.B.K.R. Institute of Science and Technology (NBKRIST), established in 1979, is an autonomous engineering college located in Vidyanagar, Kota, Nellore district, Andhra Pradesh. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur (JNTUA), it is one of the oldest private engineering institutions in the state. Spread across a serene campus, the institute is widely recognized for its strong focus on undergraduate and postgraduate engineering disciplines, industry collaboration, dedicated technical clubs, and a long-standing legacy of technical education.
accreditation: Accredited by NAAC with an 'A' Grade (3rd Cycle); engineering programs are accredited by the NBA. Recognized by UGC as a 'College with Potential for Excellence' (CPE).

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech Flagship Programs (CSE, AI & DS, AI & ML)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹77,000 – ₹1,00,000 per year. Total course fee ranges from ₹3,08,000 to ₹4,00,000.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech Core Programs (ECE, EEE, Mechanical, Civil, IT)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹46,400 – ₹77,000 per year. Total tuition fee ranges from ₹1,86,000 to ₹3,08,000.

coursesAndFees.program: M.Tech Specializations (Power Systems, VLSI, Structural, CSE)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹40,000 – ₹50,000 per year. Total course fee ranges from ₹80,000 to ₹1,00,000.

placements.totalOffers: 500+ job offers and internship letters during active placement seasons
placements.companiesVisited: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, HCL, Tech Mahindra, Zoho, SAP
placements.internshipHighlights: Over 45% to 50% of technical students secure paid or product-based internships with recruiting partners

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are strictly governed by state counseling. For undergraduate courses, seats are allocated via AP EAPCET counseling (Category A) and management quota (Category B). For postgraduate streams, AP PGECET or GATE rankings apply.
admissions.importantDates: Schedules align directly with the Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE) and AP EAPCET enrollment timelines.

campus.area: Spread across a green landscape with separate administrative and academic blocks.
campus.specialNote: Hostel safety is heavily monitored with tight security parameters. Mess charges serve timely vegetarian and regional meals.

contact.address: N.B.K.R. Institute of Science & Technology, Vidyanagar, Kota Mandal, Tirupati District, Andhra Pradesh – 524413, India
contact.admissionsEmail: crreddy1966@gmail.com (Admissions Incharge: Dr. C Raveendra Reddy)

scholarships.meritScholarships: Fee waivers available according to guidelines set by state regulatory cells.
scholarships.fullWaiver: Eligible candidates entering through top AP EAPCET counseling ranks can claim complete tuition exemptions.
scholarships.partialWaiver: Concessions are issued based on management-approved criteria for economically weaker sections.
scholarships.governmentAid: Full fee reimbursement is applicable for eligible backward classes, SC, ST, and minority students under the Andhra Pradesh state Jagananna Amma Vodi / JVD welfare programs.
